ldJson.name: Luna Landing
ldJson.description: Fictitious company that seeks to elevate and simplify the lives of web developers.

heroData.title: Open Your Mind to the Universe: Welcome to
heroData.subTitle: Discover the Beauty of the Cosmos: Explore the Infinite Wonders of Space with Us

servicesData.title: Everything you need to build a website

services.title: Professional Templates
services.description: Our templates are crafted by experienced web designers, ensuring a modern and polished look for your site. From typography to element design, every detail is carefully considered to convey a professional image.

services.title: Integrated Accessibility
services.description: We care about web accessibility and have integrated features to ensure your site is accessible to all users, including those with visual or motor disabilities. Our templates comply with WCAG accessibility standards to provide an inclusive experience for everyone.

services.title: SEO-Optimized
services.description: We understand the importance of your site being visible in search engines. That's why our templates are optimized for SEO, meaning they are structured and coded to be easily indexed by Google and other search engines, helping to improve your ranking in search results.

services.title: Easy Set up
services.description: With our templates, you don't need to be a web development expert to have an impressive site. They are easy to set up and customize, with intuitive options that allow you to change colors, fonts, page layout, and more with just a few clicks. Make your site stand out hassle-free!

adventajesData.title: Unlock the Power of Luna Landing: Discover the Key Benefits

adventajes.title: Take Your Website to Perfection
adventajes.description: Our intuitive customization options empower you to create a website that stands out and resonates with your audience like never before. Say goodbye to cookie-cutter designs and hello to a website that truly reflects your vision and personality.
adventajes.imageAlt: Architectural precision blocks with neon laser alignment indicator

adventajes.title: Reach the Top of Search Rankings
adventajes.description: Elevate your online visibility with our SEO-optimized template. Built with search engine algorithms in mind, our template is designed to help your website climb to the top of search engine results pages (SERPs). From optimized meta tags and clean HTML structure to mobile responsiveness and fast loading times, every aspect of our template is geared towards maximizing your website's search engine performance. Increase your organic traffic, attract more visitors, and grow your online presence with ease.
adventajes.imageAlt: 3D ascending neon arrow with floating white data cubes representing SEO growth

brandsData.title: Integration with Leading Technologies
brandsData.description: Effortlessly integrate with leading technologies. Our platform seamlessly supports industry-standard tools and frameworks, enabling you to stay ahead of the curve and maximize productivity. Explore endless possibilities with our comprehensive compatibility features

tiers.title: Starter
tiers.description: Best option for personal use & for your next project.

tiers.title: Professional
tiers.description: Relevant for multiple users, extended & premium support.

tiers.title: Enterprise
tiers.description: Best for large scale uses and extended redistribution rights.

footerData.description: Discover the Beauty of the Cosmos: Explore the Infinite Wonders of Space with Us

privacyData.intro: At Luna Landing, your data is your property. We only collect what is strictly necessary to provide our service.

sections.title: Data Collection
sections.body: We collect your Name and Email via our contact form — nothing more. We do not use persistent tracking cookies, fingerprinting, or dark patterns designed to manipulate your consent. Every piece of data we hold has a clear and declared purpose.

items.detail: You can request a total scrubbing of your data at any time. Send us a deletion request and we will purge every record tied to your identity within 30 days — no questions asked.
You have the right to access any data collected since January 1, 2022. We will provide a full export of your data within 14 days of a verified request.
We do not use AI agents or automated systems to make binding legal or financial decisions about you. Every consequential decision involves a human in the loop.

sections.title: How We Protect Your Data
sections.body: Data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We do not sell, rent, or share your data with third parties for commercial purposes. We use minimal, privacy-respecting analytics with no cross-site tracking.

sections.title: Changes to This Policy
sections.body: If we make material changes to this policy, we will notify you by email at least 30 days before they take effect. You always have the right to opt out and request deletion before any new terms apply to your data.
